response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff/Senior Software Engineer with nearly two decades of experience, which vastly exceeds the entry-level to mid-level scope of this role. While he possesses all the required and nice-to-have technical skills, including TypeScript, React, AWS, and AI integrations, his extreme overqualification and current location (São Paulo) compared to the high on-site requirement make him an unsuitable fit for a junior position.
strengths: Extensive expertise in TypeScript, React, and full-stack web architecture.
Strong background in clean architecture, TDD, and CI/CD practices.
Possesses key nice-to-have skills including AWS, Kubernetes, and AI/LLM integrations.
concerns: Massively overqualified for an entry-level position with nearly 20 years of experience.
High risk of salary mismatch and rapid turnover given his Staff Engineer background.
Based in São Paulo, which likely conflicts with the role's high on-site presence requirement.
